source_data.prob_desc_input_spec: The first line of the input contains integer n (1 ≤ n ≤ 1000).
source_data.prob_desc_output_spec: Output the smallest positive integer with exactly n divisors.
source_data.prob_desc_description: Given the number n, find the smallest positive integer which has exactly n divisors. It is guaranteed that for the given n the answer will not exceed 1018.
